3299860.name: Kvark - Soundtrack & Wallpapers
3299860.description:
Original game soundtrack and key art as wallpapers in various resolutions and aspect ratios. Soundtrack was composed by Jakub Řehoř.

Tracklist:

  • 01. Welcome Comrade (01:19)

  • 02. P892 (02:52)

  • 03. Barrel March (04:18)

  • 04. Not Going Down There (01:09)

  • 05. Just A Hallucination (03:02)

  • 06. On A Snail (03:15)

  • 07. Unfortunate Event (01:37)

  • 08. Dill Goulash Experiment (03:10)

  • 09. Čest Práci (01:31)

  • 10. Confiscated Peacemaker (03:29)

  • 11. In Loving Memory of Comrade Kanárek (05:02)

  • 12. Pistons (00:21)

  • 13. Deanethisation (01:49)

  • 14. Pig Iron (02:32)

  • 15. No Spiders Here (01:35)

  • 16. It's Locked (02:06)

  • 17. Pipe Wrench Mayhem (01:55)

  • 18. Failure Rose (03:42)

  • 19. Weekly Report (00:37)

  • 20. Metallic Gluten (04:43)

  • 21. Robotic Toolshed (02:44)

  • 22. Immediate Quarantine Is Ordered (05:16)

  • 23. CMK Glitch (03:34)

  • 24. Underwater Development (04:41)

  • 25. Komplex Výzkumu Atomové Radosti Kvark (01:10)

  • 26. First Day of Work (02:15)

  • 27. Placeholder Bossa (03:05)

  • 28. Safety Muzak (00:49)

  • 29. Robotic Toolshed (Extended Version) (03:54)

  • 30. Rusty Locker Tell No Tales (Bonus Track) (01:40)
